classical_node_summary.key_property: 2-4x more TH+ neurons in females; AVPV A14 dopaminergic group

1.db_score_explanation: Maximum rank-1 DB score was 2 across all 20 candidates. SUPT_0486 appears in the DB list at score=2 but was not ranked higher because Th is not in its supertype-level defining_markers metadata, and the NT mismatch (GABAergic label vs. dopaminergic query) suppressed scoring. The sex_bias bonus does not apply at rank-1 (supertype-level sex ratio not available in DB). Score ceiling of 2 reflects location + partial marker matches only.

recommended_candidate.label: 0486 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
recommended_candidate.recommendation_rationale: SUPT_0486 is the parent of CLUS_1915, which is the top-ranked rank-0 candidate with score=6, MFR=0.02, Th=6.6, Kiss1=2.51, and nt_type=Dopa confirmed in cluster.yaml. The DB scoring function cannot propagate child-cluster sex-bias signals upward to supertype rank — SUPT_0486 therefore scores only 2 at rank-1 despite being the clear recommended supertype. Three independent convergent signals establish SUPT_0486 as the correct supertype: (1) CLUS_1915 is its child and top rank-0 candidate; (2) supertype-level Th=2.72, Kiss1=0.62, Esr1=7.72 are all concordant with avpv_th_neuron markers; (3) MBA:272 (AVPV) is explicitly represented in SUPT_0486 anatomical_location (n=16 cells).
recommended_candidate.nt_type_resolution: SUPT_0486 carries a GABAergic (Gaba_5) supertype label. This NT mismatch is resolved at cluster level: CLUS_1915 has nt_type=Dopa confirmed in the taxonomy (cluster.yaml, name_in_source='Dopa'). The Gaba_5 label reflects the majority of cells across the full supertype spanning PVpo-VMPO-MPN; the dopaminergic AVPV subpopulation is a minority within SUPT_0486.
recommended_candidate.avpv_location_fraction: MBA:272 (AVPV) n=16 out of ~144 total cells (~11%) — below the 20% primary-location threshold. However, AVPV cells are present and the AVPV-specific child cluster CLUS_1915 (the rank-0 best candidate) is the primary basis for recommendation. Location fraction at supertype level underestimates AVPV relevance because CLUS_1915 contains AVPV cells (MBA:272 n=1, MBA:133 n=1, MBA:1097 n=3).

CLUS_1912.assessment: Th-positive, no Kiss1 — background Th expression, not AVPV-specific

CLUS_1913.assessment: Male-biased (MFR=10.11), excludes as FEMALE_BIASED AVPV TH candidate

CLUS_1914.assessment: Male-biased (MFR=10.11), no Kiss1 — not AVPV TH candidate

CLUS_1915.assessment: BEST CHILD — Th highest in lineage (6.6), Kiss1 only cluster >1.5 (2.51), extreme female bias (MFR=0.02), nt_type=Dopa confirmed. AVPV cells present (MBA:272 n=1). All three defining criteria converge.

CLUS_1916.assessment: Female-biased but Th=0.68 (very low) and Kiss1=0.04 — not Th-positive; likely a distinct Esr1-high preoptic subtype

caveats: NT mismatch at supertype level (Gaba_5 label vs. dopaminergic classical type); resolved at cluster level by CLUS_1915 nt_type=Dopa
SUPT_0486 is anatomically broader than AVPV: spans PVpo-VMPO-MPN; AVPV cells are a minority (n=16, ~11%)
avpv_th_neuron, avpv_kiss1_neuron, and mpoa_esr1_neuron all map to SUPT_0486 — supertype is heterogeneous; cluster-level resolution is essential
CLUS_1915 has only n=3 cells total in the atlas; inference is based on very few cells and sex ratio (MFR=0.02) should be interpreted cautiously given small n

other_rank1_candidates_assessed.label: 0427 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_1
other_rank1_candidates_assessed.assessment: IMPLAUSIBLE — ARH (arcuate hypothalamus) and periventricular zona incerta anatomy; no AVPV cells. Dopaminergic label matches but anatomy is wrong. ARH is the A12 group; AVPV TH neurons are A14.

other_rank1_candidates_assessed.label: 0428 ARH-PVi Six6 Dopa-Gaba_2
other_rank1_candidates_assessed.assessment: IMPLAUSIBLE — same ARH-PVi anatomy as SUPT_0427; no AVPV cells.

other_rank1_candidates_assessed.label: 0519-0523 AVPV-MEPO-SFO Tbr1 Glut_1-5
other_rank1_candidates_assessed.assessment: IMPLAUSIBLE — glutamatergic supertypes (Tbr1 Glut); avpv_th_neuron is dopaminergic. AVPV location label is present but NT mismatch is fundamental and Th expression is not documented for these supertypes.

other_rank1_candidates_assessed.label: 1127 MV Nr4a2 Gly-Gaba_1
other_rank1_candidates_assessed.assessment: FALSE POSITIVE — medulla/pons anatomy (MV = medial vestibular; brainstem). No hypothalamic cells. Anatomically completely discordant with AVPV. Score=2 reflects Th expression only; the sex-bias bonus inflated CLUS_5066 (its child) to score=4 at rank-0 — see rank-0 assessment.

top_candidates.label: 1915 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
top_candidates.assessment: STRONG POSITIVE — all three primary criteria fully met: (1) Th=6.6 is the highest Th expression of any child cluster in the SUPT_0486 lineage and a strong dopaminergic-marker signal; (2) Kiss1=2.51 is the only cluster with Kiss1 substantially above background, matching the defining co-expression pattern of avpv_th_neuron; (3) MFR=0.02 indicates extreme female bias (>50:1 female:male), consistent with 2-4x female-biased cell count reported in the literature. NBA:272 (AVPV) cells explicitly present. Kiss1 is a cluster-level DEFINING marker confirming the Kiss1+Th+ co-expression phenotype. nt_type=Dopa confirmed.
top_candidates.recommendation: PRIMARY — recommend as best available cluster-level atlas match for avpv_th_neuron
caveats: Very small cluster (n=3 total cells at primary soma MBA:1097; n=1 each at MBA:133 and MBA:272) — sex ratio (MFR=0.02) based on small N; statistical power is limited
Kiss1 is DEFINING at cluster level but Th is not listed as a cluster-level DEFINING marker in cluster.yaml — Th expression is high (6.6) but defined as precomputed expression, not a marker annotation
Slc18a2 (VMAT2, vesicular monoamine transporter) is a DEFINING cluster marker, providing additional dopaminergic/monoaminergic identity support beyond Th expression alone

top_candidates.label: 5066 MV Nr4a2 Gly-Gaba_1
top_candidates.assessment: FALSE POSITIVE — Th is a DEFINING cluster marker and MFR=0.25 (female-biased) drove score=4 via sex_bias bonus, but anatomy is entirely brainstem (pons, medulla, vestibular nuclei). There are zero hypothalamic cells. This is a brainstem TH-expressing dopaminergic cluster with no relationship to the AVPV A14 group. The score=4 result is a known artifact of the scoring function rewarding Th marker + sex_bias bonus without anatomical penalty.
top_candidates.recommendation: EXCLUDE — anatomically incompatible with avpv_th_neuron (brainstem vs. AVPV hypothalamus)

top_candidates.label: 1301 MEA-BST Lhx6 Nfib Gaba_4
top_candidates.assessment: IMPLAUSIBLE — MEA-BST anatomy (medial amygdala/bed nucleus of stria terminalis), GABAergic NT, MFR=0.1 female-biased. Score=4 driven by sex_bias bonus only; no marker concordance with Th or Kiss1; wrong anatomy and wrong NT.

top_candidates.label: 1904 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_3
top_candidates.assessment: UNLIKELY — PVpo-VMPO-MPN anatomy is adjacent to AVPV region; nt_type=Dopa. However MFR=1.5 (male-biased), which is discordant with the female-biased avpv_th_neuron. No sex_bias bonus applied (MFR above threshold).
top_candidates.recommendation: LOW PRIORITY — anatomically adjacent but sex ratio discordant

top_candidates.label: 1907 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_3
top_candidates.assessment: NOTE — this is the same cluster referenced in the arc_aromatase_neuron edge as carrying Cyp19a1 as a defining marker. MFR=2.7 (male-biased), which is incompatible with the female-biased avpv_th_neuron.
top_candidates.recommendation: EXCLUDE — male-biased sex ratio directly contradicts female-biased classical type

sex_bias_flagged_clusters: CS20230722_CLUS_1891 (MFR=0.1, PVpo-VMPO-MPN Gaba_2 — GABA not Dopa, borderline)
CS20230722_CLUS_1895 (MFR=0.06, PVpo-VMPO-MPN Gaba_2 — GABA not Dopa, borderline)
CS20230722_CLUS_2251 (MFR=0.09, MPN-MPO-PVpo Hmx2 Glut_3 — glutamatergic, exclude)

best_child_cluster.label: 1915 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
best_child_cluster.confidence_assessment: MODERATE — three convergent signals (Th=6.6, Kiss1=2.51, MFR=0.02) in correct anatomy (hypothalamic/preoptic zone with AVPV cells present). Confidence capped at MODERATE due to very small cluster size (n=3-5 total cells). Slc18a2 (VMAT2) as a DEFINING marker is strong additional support for monoaminergic identity. Cluster-level edge to CLUS_1915 would be more specific than supertype-level edge to SUPT_0486.

annotation_transfer_f1.notes: No AnnotationTransferEvidence records found in kb/draft/ for SUPT_0486 or CLUS_1915. annotation-transfer workflow has not been run for the sexually_dimorphic KB. F1 assessment deferred.

summary_recommendation.rank_1_recommendation: CS20230722_SUPT_0486 — recommended despite DB rank position 10 (score=2). Justification: parent of top rank-0 candidate CLUS_1915; direct AVPV location representation; marker concordance (Th, Kiss1, Esr1); NT mismatch at supertype level resolved at cluster level by CLUS_1915 (Dopa confirmed).
summary_recommendation.rank_0_recommendation: CS20230722_CLUS_1915 — top candidate (score=6). Strong positive: Th=6.6 (strongest in lineage), Kiss1=2.51 (only cluster with significant Kiss1), MFR=0.02 (extreme female bias), nt_type=Dopa confirmed, AVPV cells present, Slc18a2 DEFINING marker supports monoaminergic identity.
summary_recommendation.key_false_positive_warning: CS20230722_CLUS_5066 (rank-0 position 2, score=4) is a brainstem false positive. Its score=4 is driven by Th DEFINING marker + MFR=0.25 sex_bias bonus. Anatomy is entirely pons/medulla/vestibular (SUPT_1127 MV). It should be excluded from all mapping consideration for avpv_th_neuron.
summary_recommendation.confidence_summary: MODERATE confidence in SUPT_0486/CLUS_1915 as the primary atlas match. Small cluster size (CLUS_1915 n=3-5 cells) and supertype-level NT mismatch (Gaba_5 vs. dopaminergic) are the main uncertainty drivers. Annotation transfer (MapMyCells on Th-Cre or Kiss1-Cre AVPV scRNA-seq data) would be the critical next step to upgrade confidence.
